CustomField.description: Tracks the overall lifecycle of the household visit from scheduling through final approval
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Current stage of the visit and documentation process. Update as you move through assessment, documentation, and approval steps.
CustomField.label: Household Visit Status

value.description: • Confirm household address and contact information • Review prior visit history and case notes • Prepare assessment forms and checklist • Schedule appointment with household member
value.label: Scheduled

value.description: • Conduct in-home functional assessment • Observe activities of daily living (ADLs) • Dictate or record visit notes • Scan any handwritten documentation • Document household conditions and safety concerns
value.label: Visit In Progress

value.description: • Generate draft narrative from visit notes • Review AI-generated functional rankings • Validate rankings against clinical observations • Complete all required assessment sections • Attach supporting documentation and photos
value.label: Documentation Pending

value.description: • Senior social worker reviews narrative and rankings • Verify exception justifications are documented • Check for consistency between observations and hours • Approve or request revisions • Document supervisor approval decision
value.label: Under Review

value.description: • Finalized narrative approved by supervisor • Service authorization generated • Household notified of eligibility decision • Case file closed and ready for benefits processing • All documentation archived
value.label: Complete
